reviews.review_title: IS THIS GAME EVER GONNA BE FINISHED?
reviews.review_description: Serious question, there hasn't been an update for 2 and a half years now. STILL IN EARLY ACCESS!

reviews.review_title: Love the game and super unique!
reviews.review_description: Great game! Love the concept. I know it's been a long time since you released it, but it would be amazing to have an infinite mode! Either way great job!
